directive: When changing the Skill Seekers package version, edit pyproject.toml only; do not edit src/skill_seekers/_version.py.
rationale: The project declares pyproject.toml as the package metadata source and _version.py dynamically reads that value to avoid mismatches across files. Directly patching _version.py can create version drift.

source_evidence.excerpt: Single source of truth for skill-seekers version. This module dynamically reads the version from pyproject.toml to avoid version mismatches across multiple files.
The version reader locates pyproject.toml, loads it with tomllib, and returns pyproject_data["project"]["version"].
The project metadata contains name = "skill-seekers" and version = "3.6.0".
